title: Uber 乘客侧 —— 需求侧

description.en: App-based on-demand transportation. Riders see a fare upfront, pay via card-on-file, get matched to the nearest driver. Surge pricing applies during peak demand. The rider side is the subsidy-receiving side — heavy promotional spend (free first ride, referral credits) to bootstrap network density; commission per ride is the revenue extraction.
description.zh: 基于 App 的按需出行。乘客在叫车时直接看到预估车费,通过绑卡支付,系统匹配最近的司机。高峰期触发 Surge 动态定价。乘客侧是补贴侧 —— 通过大量促销(首单免费、邀请红包)来引爆网络密度;每单佣金是收入抽取的来源。
